title: Developer Mode - Enablement
excerpt:
I am looking to start playing with the API and can’t seem to find how to enable deveopler mode. 
I followed this little video “https://monday.com/developers/v2#introduction-section” however, I dont seem to have a “Monday…

posts.author: Darryl (monman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to start playing with the API and can’t seem to find how to enable deveopler mode.

I followed this little video “https://monday.com/developers/v2#introduction-section” however, I dont seem to have a “Monday Labs” option. Im guessing this has something to do with my account? Maybe as its a trial account?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Darryl:

seem to have a “Monday Labs” option. Im guessing this has something to do with my account? Maybe as its a trial account?

Hi @Darryl

Are you sure you are logged in with an admin account?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe try to click the Admin menu, does that work or do you get a message that you are not the admin? An admin should be able to see the monday Labs. If not: you best contact the support team, they are amazing

posts.author: Darryl (monman)
posts.cookedHtml: Yip have tried that and the reason I am pretty sure its an admin account. That and I only made one account.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Darryl – are you on a trial by any chance? If so, we’ll need to enable the “monday.labs” feature.

Just reach out to support@monday.com with your account URL and we’d be happy to add it to your account.

Cheers! Dipro
